name: Anticrepuscular Rays

distinctive_features: appear to converge toward the antisolar point
can be continuous with crepuscular rays
visual_attributes.structural_arrangement: rays appear to converge at a vanishing point opposite the Sun

functional_attributes.primary_function: optical illusion due to atmospheric light scattering
secondary_functions: visual phenomenon at dawn or dusk
creates a visual connection with crepuscular rays

domain_specific_functional.light_scattering: backscattering at low angles to the horizon

relationships.description: Anticrepuscular rays are similar to crepuscular rays but appear opposite the Sun.

contextual_attributes.cultural_significance: aesthetic and scientific interest in atmospheric optics

contrastive_constraints: NOT associated with a specific cultural or mythological narrative
